overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a futuristic urban tunnel from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a distinctive section with a transparent water ceiling. The camera moves steadily through the concrete corridor as vehicles pass by, transitioning between enclosed artificial lighting and the surreal blue-green glow of the water above.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed concrete tunnel with solid ceiling and fluorescent lighting

events.description: white futuristic car drives past on the right side of the tunnel
black vehicle passes by on the right traveling in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark enclosed tunnel corridor

notable_agents.action: futuristic white sedan driving through the tunnel with headlights on

entered.detail: dark concrete wall with vertical paneling running along the left side of the corridor
solid concrete ceiling with embedded linear fluorescent light fixtures
large circular metal ventilation ducts mounted on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dark enclosed tunnel with concrete walls and a solid ceiling illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. The corridor is narrow with vehicles occasionally passing by on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel with transparent water ceiling showing rippling aquatic surface above

events.description: tunnel ceiling opens to reveal transparent water surface above, flooding the space with bright cyan natural light
silver van drives past on the right side of the tunnel

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the tunnel as the environment dramatically brightens with ethereal light filtering through the water ceiling

notable_agents.action: green sports car speeding through the illuminated tunnel section

entered.detail: transparent ceiling revealing rippling water surface with bright cyan light creating caustic patterns below
tall illuminated vertical billboards with red and yellow graphics lining the right wall

segments.scene_description: The tunnel transforms as the ceiling opens to reveal a stunning transparent water surface above, bathing the corridor in ethereal cyan light. Bright advertising billboards line the right wall while vehicles continue to pass through this surreal aquatic-lit section.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to enclosed tunnel section with solid concrete ceiling

events.description: exiting the water ceiling section, returning to darker enclosed tunnel with artificial fluorescent lighting
blue vintage-style car passes on the right side of the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the final enclosed section of the tunnel as the lighting returns to artificial and the ceiling becomes solid again

notable_agents.action: white truck driving slowly through the tunnel corridor

entered.detail: solid concrete ceiling returning to enclose the tunnel space with fluorescent lighting
large circular metal ventilation ducts reappearing on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The tunnel returns to its original enclosed state with solid ceiling and artificial lighting. The camera continues walking forward through the concrete corridor as various vehicles pass by, completing the journey through this cyberpunk underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic concrete tunnel that briefly transforms into a surreal aquatic corridor before returning to its enclosed state. It begins in a dark, narrow underpass with solid ceilings and fluorescent overhead lighting, moving forward as vehicles pass by on the right. As the camera advances, the ceiling opens to reveal a transparent water surface that bathes the environment in an ethereal cyan glow, while bright advertising billboards illuminate the right wall. The scene then shifts back to the original enclosed architecture, with the water disappearing and the artificial lighting returning. Finally, the camera continues its steady walk through the concrete corridor as more vehicles pass, completing the journey through the cyberpunk underpass.
